titleStmt.title: SII 35.65: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 65. (A.R. No. 94 of 1951-52.) RAṬṬIHAḶḶI, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. I) kept in Madhy-maṇḍapa of the Kadaṁbēśvara temple.

This inscription referring itself to the reign of Rāyamurāri Sōvidēva is dated in Śaka 1097, Jaya, Jyēshṭha Amāvāsya, solar eclipse, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1174, June 2, the tithi ended at • 33 the previous day when there was a solar eclipse.

The record registers a gift of gold, a row of houses, oil mill etc., made into the hands of the divine Kalyāṇaśakti for the offerings to the god and repairs to the temple of Kaḍaṁbēśvara by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Pāṇḍyadēva and his subordinate Chauṇḍarasa. Describes the Banavāsi country, its kaṁpaṇa Nūṟuṁbāḍa with the chief town Raṭṭahaḷḷi and the genealogy of the chiefs ruling over the latter to whose family Pāṇḍyadēva belonged.

The epigraph eulogies Raṭṭapaḷḷi and its chiefs. The name of the author of this record is given in the last line, but it is unfortunately damaged and lost. The extant portion refers to • • • dēvarasa. The name of the engraver is also lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrī matpṛthvīdharēṁdra priyataratanayāsmēravaktrōdghapaṁkējāmōdāsvāda
saukhyōtpuḷakamadhukaraṁ padmapīṭhādhidēvastōmastōtrābja saṁpūjitacaraṇayugaṁ śrī kaḍaṁbēśanudyatprēmaṁ pāṁḍyakṣitīśaṁgabhimataphaḷamaṁ māḍugā
caṁdratāraṁ . v® . girijāprāṇēśanaṁtaṁtatibahaḷakapa¨rddāṁka vākāśabhāgāṁtaradaṁtātta prātāpāhimakaraniḷayaṁ nūtnakaṁkellabhūjōtkaradaṁtaṁ catpravā
ḷaprakarasuruciraṁ raṁjikuṁ saṁtataṁ prasphuradutchucchāgramatsya prajanitalaharīrāvaraudraṁ samudraṁ . v® . tadudanvadvaḷayāv®taṁ vinutaṁ jaṁbūdvīpa
vatyaṁtasaṁmadasaṁpādakavoppi tōṟuvudu tanmadhyasthitaṁ dēvatāsadanaṁ rājisugaṁdhanādrivi haratsiddhāmaradvaṁdva kāmaḍa ha¨rmyāvaḷi ramyasānuvidaḷacchāmīkarābjākaraṁ .
kaṁ . bharatakṣētraṁ tadbhūdharadiṁ teṁkalvirājikuṁ taddhātrīvara vanitege kuṁtaḷadavolurutara-voppuvudu kuṁtaḷakṣitisatataṁ . va . Ā mahitamahītaḷamaṁ nijavijayabhuja
baladiṁ tāḷdidanēkacāḷukyacakrēśvaraprava¨rttanābyatyayadoḷu . v® . dhareyaṁ tatphaṇirājanā¨rttu taḷedoppaṁ bettu tō¨rppaṁtiru¨rvvareyaṁ tāḷdi nijāyatōṁnatabhujaṁ celvaṁ
kuḍalulakṣmipēruradoḷuraṁjisetō¨rppa viṣṇuvinavōrātmīyavakṣōbjamaṁdiradoḷniṁdira liṁdirākhye negaḷdaṁ śrībijjabhūpāḷakaṁ . kaṁ . tattaneyaṁ rūpiṁ maghava¨rtta
neyananūnadānaguṇadiṁ sale bhāsvattaneyaṁ vikramada maruttaneyaṁ sōmabhūmipaṁ pese¨rvvettaṁ . v® . vanadu¨rggāḷige vāridu¨rgganikarakku¨rvvīdhradu¨rggōtkarakke
nitāṁtaṁdavavahnivā¨rdhidahanaṁ śaiḷāriśastrāgniyeṁdaniśaṁ kī¨rttise kū¨rttudhātri taḷedaṁ sōmāvanīśaṁ haridvanitācaṁdanacāruca¨rcceyene saṁdudyadyaśaḥkānte
yaṁ . va . Aṁtu giridu¨rggamallanenisida rāyamurāri sōvidēvana vijayabhujaparipāḷita dēśadoḷu viśēṣavenipa banavāsidēśada viḷāsaveṁtene . v® . daḷitasarōjarā
ji navavārijadoḷsuḷigoṁḍu baṁḍanuṁbaḷinikaraṁ madhubrata madhusvakamaṁgeḍegoṁḍu pāṁḍarauvvaḷipa vanēcaritavanēcarakāṁteyaraṁgakāṁtiyaṁ taḷeda tamāḷajāḷaveseguṁ banadoḷbanavāsi
dēśadoḷu . mattaṁ . v® . kaḷikegaḷiṁde puṣpacayadiṁde phaḷōtkaradiṁde kōkiḷāvaḷige madhubratāḷige śukaprakarakke manaṟpramōdamaṁ baḷayisi cūtabhūjatatipakva
phaḷōtthara sapravāhadiṁ kaḷamavanaṁgaḷaṁ taṇiputi¨rppudu tadviṣayāṁtarāḷadoḷu . Antu śōbhavetta banavāsiviṣayalakṣmīge cūḍāpīḍavenipa nūṟuṁbāḍadoppaveṁ
tene . v® . viḷasadaśōkapallavanutādhare saṁbh®taphullamallikākuḷa kusumāḷimāḷa vikasadvanajānane mattabh®ṁgakuṁtaḷe kaḷakōkiḷasvane lasallatikāṁgi vasaṁtala
kṣmī niścaḷataravāgi śōbhipudu tadviṣayāṁtaradoḷniraṁtaraṁ . kaṁ . Āḍuva sōgenavilu naḍedāḍuva kaḷahaṁse pāḍuvaḷiveṇmudamaṁ māḍe janakke manōjana māḍavideni
suvudu nāḍe nūṟuṁ bāḍaṁ . va . Antu kantuva karumāḍadaṁte rūḍhivetta noṟuṁbāḍada viḷasanakke kaḷasavenisi sukhada baḷḷavaḷḷiyāda raṭṭapaḷḷi celvaṁ pēḷvaḍe . kaṁ . su
ttidaḷāpuravaravadhu cittaṁ betteseyalesava dugulamanane tāṁ suttikumutpati nelasire suttiṁ tatpurada puṁṇyavādudagaṇyaṁ . Ā purada bahirudyānadoppamaṁ nō
ḷpaḍe . kaṁ . Eseya taḷi¨rppokāyva paṇneseyalaśōkāṁbra panasapogāvaḷi kaṇgesevudā puralakṣmiya baṇnasaravidenalu pavanaṁ sugaṁdhitapavana . kaṁ . taṇnaṁdama
neṇdeseyattaṇgāgire bīṟutaṁ bhramadbhramarakuḷaṁ kaṇgōḷise tammoḷesevuvu paṇgaḷa poṟevottumaiṁ-davāḷegaḷeṁdu . Ā puravaradoḷu . kaṁ . dhanadanumaṁ
vāgvanitēśanumaṁ śūdrakanumaṁ viḍaṁbisuti¨rkkuṁ vinutavaṇigviprabhaṭāḷi niraṁtaraveṁdoḍēnana-bhiva¨rṇnipudo . kaṁ . sthiralāgire śivasadmamanutaravettisuva puṁ
ṇyapuruṣara visaradvarakī¨rttiyene sudhāsuruciradēvag®hāḷi raṭṭapaḷḷiyoḷeseguṁ . Adalladeyuṁ . v® . lōḷaviḷōcanaṁ kusumabāṇana śātaśarāḷivakrita
bhrūlalitāsitēkṣuk®tacāpanakuṁḍaḷitōdchakā¨rmmukaṁbāḷām®ṇaḷadolsategatīśana pāśavenalmanōjanastrālaya līleyaṁ geleviḍaṁbipudalliya kāminījanaṁ . v® .
muḷisiṁ māṟānta vairikṣitiparabalamaṁ pokku taṁnaśvadiṁdū¨rttiḷemeccalkuṁbhikuṁbha kkogedu kaḍupiniṁ koṁdu mēli¨rddaraṁ dō¨rvvaḷadiṁ taddaṁntiyaṁ cakrige gaḍa piḍi taṁdittutāṁpetta
naṁtāgaḷe nūṟuṁbāḍamaṁ pēḷu dhuradoḷadiradaṁ bīradēvaṁgadāvaṁ . v® . munisiṁdāṁtarise negeydi hayadiṁ mattēbhakuṁbhakke toṭṭane pāydeṟedaraṁ paḍaluvaḍisu
taṁ taddaṁntiyaṁ cakrigiṁbane tānoppisi pettanaśramade noṟuṁbāḍamaṁ bīradēvana bīrakkedeguṁdadi¨rppadaṭarāriṁnuṁ mahīcakradoḷu . va . Antu pogaḷtevetta raṭṭapaḷḷiga
dhipatiyene negaḷdā bīradēvanaṁnvayōṁnnatiyeṁteṁdaḍe . kaṁ . Ātana tammaṁ negaḷdaṁ kētarasaṁ tattanūbhavaṁ nāmarasaṁ bhūtaḷapati nāmarasaṁgātataguṇi kētabhūbhujaṁ
sutanenipaṁ . tattaneyaṁ polakēsinṛpōttamanātaṁge kiṟeyanene saṁdu jasaṁ betteseva pe¨rmmāḍi viyattaḷa cararājadānaguṇanu¨rvvareyoḷu . kaṁ . jagadoḷe
raṇakinṛpāḷaṁ mige bhujabaladoḷu kirīṭiyiṁ rāvaṇaniṁ negaḷda nīlajaniṁ javaniṁ dviguṇaṁ triguṇaṁ catu¨rgguṇaṁ paṁcaguṇaṁ . kaṁ . kētanṛpāḷaṁgakhiḷakhyātagunnata
guṇaṁge rāmaṁgeṁtā sīte vadhuvādaḷaṁtire bhūtaḷanutayattiyabbe satiyenalesevaḷ . va . Āntavari¨rvva¨rggaṁ negaḷtevetta vahnitrayame rūpugoṇḍaṁte caṁṇḍaparākra
ma¨rvvīradēva baṁmarasa mallidēvareṁba mūva¨rmmakkaḷādaralli mallidēvana vikramakramamaṁ pēḷvaḍe . v® . paranarapāḷajīvanamarutvaripānade taṁna khaḍganiṣṭu
ratara kṛṣṇasa¨rpananurāgamaneyda virōdhibhūbhujōtkaravanitākadaṁbanayanāṁbugaḷiṁ naḍiputtami¨rppanuddara nijakōpapāvakananāṁpavanāvanō malla
bhūpanaṁ . kaṁ . Āṁtarinṛparaṁ tatkṣaṇadiṁ tīkṣṇakṛtāṁtudante saṁtatiyeḍeyoḷ tūṁtuvanene ba¨rmmarasanoḷāṁ toḍa¨rdapeneṁbanāvaniṁnuṁ muṁnaṁ . va . Āvari¨rvva
riṁ piriyaṁ sakaḷaguṇadoḷāriṁ piriyanenipa bīradēvana bīramaṁ pēḷvaḍe . v® . paḍeyaṁ nuggi phaṇāmaṇi prakaramaṁ tāṁ koḷguveṁdaḷḷi bāyviḍutaṁ tatphaṇipaṁ dharāta
ḷadadhōbhāgakke pakkādaniṁ puḍimāḷkuṁ taḷadiṁde taṁnanenutaṁ tadbhītiyiṁdaṁ siḍilnaḍugutti¨rppudidēṁ pratāpanidhiyō śrī bīrabhūpāḷakaṁ . kaṁ . bācaladēvi
viśāḷaviḷōcanepatibhaktiyuktavadhuvādaḷtadbhūcakrēśvarabhīraṁgīcaturaṁbōdhivaḷayitāvani pogaḷal . kaṁ . Antava¨rgge puṭṭidaṁ ratikāntaṁ muṁnentu si
rigavaṁbujanābhaṁgaṁ tanayanādanantire tāntaguṇaṁ kēta bhūpanakhiḷakaḷāpaṁ . Ātana vikhyātiyeṁtene . v® . parahitaneṁdu śaucaguṇaneṁdu dayāparaneṁdu satya
dāgaravivaneṁdu puṁṇyanidhiyeṁdu viḷāsanivāsaneṁdu ni¨rbbharataradāniyeṁdu sitakī¨rtti vadhūvaraneṁdu kū¨rttukētarasananāgaḷuṁ pogaḷuti¨rppudu vā¨rddhiparīta bhūtaḷaṁ . v® .
nirutaṁ kādaṁbavaṁśāṁbararaviyene vikhyātiyaṁ tāḷdidā kētarasaṁgaṁ guttavaṁśāṁbuja vanadinakṛdbhānusanmāḷe vidvadvaracakravrātanūtāmaralate laḷiyādēvigaṁ
putraneṁdaṁdiradāvaṁgaṁda pāṇḍyāvanipana viḷasattējamaṁ baṇnipaṁnaṁ . Ātana sauṁda¨ryya śau¨ryyōdā¨ryya guṇamaṁ pēḷvaḍe . v® . visaruhasūtra ko
¨rmmeyoḷe puṣpadhanullateyaṁ nitāntavēṟisi śaśiśāṇagha¨rṣaṇa lasatkusumāstradineccukūḍe mōhisi jagavellamaṁ su baginoḷpirivaṁgajanātmaga¨rvvamaṁ bi
suṭa tanutvamaṁtaḷedanīkṣisi pāṇḍyanarūpinēḷgeyaṁ . kaṁ . kūrasi tuṇḍaṁ vīraśrīramaṇī pakṣavadhikavane tanagari bhūpōragaraneṟagi poḍevaṁ bhōrene maṇḍaḷika ga
ruḍanī pāṁḍyan®paṁ . v® . satataṁ pāṇḍyāvanīpāḷakananurutarōgrājiyoḷaccitāstrāhata vīrārāti bhūpātuḷa baḷasubhaṭāṁtrōpavītaṁ tadāsyōdgata lō
mōddāmada¨rccaṁdratatapadarikatarikariccinnamastō¨rtta muttākṣatahastaṁ rākṣasō¨rvvīsuratati parasutti¨rppudānaṁdadiṁdaṁ . kaṁ . maranuṁ hasuvuṁ kalluṁ karadīvuve pātra
vaḻidenuttaṁ salepāṇḍyarasanudārate naguvudu suratarukuḷa kāmadhēnu ciṁtāmaṇiyaṁ . saṁskṛtaṁ . vibhudhādhīśō mahāṁśussamadajanaharō .
ma¨rtyavāgaṟpracētāḥ baḷayuktassu¨rṇnadaḥ śrīvṛṣasamadhikapaḥ kētabhūpāḷajātaḥ Iti bhūcakrē vadatyanvahamamaragaṇādhīśvarādyaṣṭalōkādhipakī¨rtti śrī
vadhoṭīpatirabhavadayaṁ pāṇḍyadhātrīkaḷatraḥ . tadvallabheya tējōtiśayamaṁ nōḷpaḍe . kaṁ . nijatējōgniyinasu hṛdbrajaśalabhamanaleva vikra
mādityanṛpaṁ vijita sahaprāṁśu tadātmaje bācaladēvigalte sājaṁ tējaṁ . © svasti samadhigata-paṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara . vīrārātimaṇḍaḷi
kamadanamahēśvaraṁ . kaḍaṁbavaṁśōdbhavaṁ . cātu¨ryakamaḷōdbhavaṁ . śākhācarēṁdradhvajaṁ . rūpamakaradvajanāhavāditya . nakhiḷajanastutya . naṇiyaṁkakāṟaṁ
raṇaraṁganīṟaṁ . satyarādhēya . śaucagāṁgēya . paranārīsahōdaraṁ . vīravṛkōdaraṁ . baṁṭarabhāvaṁ . desekāṟaradēvaṁ . maṇḍaḷikagaruḍaṁ . śrī kaḍaṁbēśvaradēva pā
dārādhakaṁ . parabaḷasādhakanityādi nāmāvaḷī samāḷaṁkṛtarappa śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ pāṇḍadēvarasaru sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta
mire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . © sphuradātmīyānvayāṁbhōnidhi viśadaśaraścaṁdraneṁdeṁdu sa¨rvvō¨rvvare meccalkī¨rttivettā haḍavaḷa siriyaṇnaṁgavu¨rvvīja
nānandarasaprasyandi caṁdraprabheyenisuva cāgavvegaṁ banduva¨rggōtkararāgaṁ puṭṭe tāṁ puṭṭidanadhikaguṇaṁ cauṁḍanājipracaṇḍaṁ . v® . munididirāṁtaḍaṁnya
madanāgamanāgade taṁna kuṁtaveṁbanupamacaṁcuviṁdiṟidu khaṁḍisi rakṣisi pakṣadiṁde saṁdanuvaradoḷvinamranara pāḷakajāḷamanintu pāṇḍyabhūpa
na garuḍaṁ dharāvaḷayadoḷnegaḷdaṁ paḍavaḷḷa cauṁḍamaṁ . v® . Adirade mikku pokku paradustara-vāhiniyaṁkṣaṇā¨rddhadiṁ kadaḍiparāvanīpakakadaṁbaśirōṁ
buruhōtkaraṁgaḷaṁ vidaḷisi taṁna puṣkarade tatsubhaṭāḷi m®ṇāḷanāḷamaṁ padahatiyiṁde poṁḍipudu pāṇḍyan®pāḷagandavāraṇaṁ . v® . siḍi sabaḷaṁ
virōdhi turagāṁtramenēno suhṛdbhaṭāḷigaṇḍuḍugi bīgu¨rttuṁ beṁḍenisi śatrunṛpa¨rśa pharaṁgaḷāgiraltoḍa¨rddara gāḷaveṁba pesarīkṣise sā¨rtthakavāytu saṁtataṁ
haḍavaḷa cāṁḍanōḷsamaraśauṁḍanoḷuddhatakāḷadaṇḍanoḷu . v® . jaḷadhijaḷaṁgaḷaṁ tavipa kāyvu k®tāṁtananiḷda miseyaṁ seḷevaḷavugrakēsariya kēsaramaṁ sa
nivātmavikramaṁ kuḷagiriyaṁ kiḷalbageva balpu raṇāgradoḷappudeṁdūḍiṁ muḷiyisi jīvipaṁnarakhiḷō¨rvvareyūḷāro kumāra cauṁḍanaṁ . ka . maranallada kalpaku
jaṁ giriyallada mēru jāḍyavillada ratnākaravenipanudārateyiṁ sthirateyinī cauṁḍanadhika gaṁbhīrateyiṁ . v® . Eregoḷguṁ vīravairikṣitipatitatiyaṁ taṁna khaḍgāhi vidvadvara
sasyānanda saṁdōhamanodavisuguṁ taṁna dānōdghahēmōtkarava¨rṣaṁ vāranārījanada manamanāka¨rṣikuṁ puṣpacāpōddhurarūpōdbhāsi taṁnākṛtiyene
doreyā¨rccauṁḍanoḷmikka gaṁḍar . va . Antu negaḷtevetta śrīpāṇḍyadēvarasaruṁ kumāra cauṁḍamanuvakhiḷapradhānaparijana parivṛtarāgi¨rddoṁdu diva
saṁ dha¨rmmakathāprasaṁgadoḷvijayavanitāka¨rṣaṇa samudyataraṁte dha¨rmmamaṁ balviḍiviḍiva bageyiṁ kaḍaṁbarājyalakṣmībhavanakkadhiṣṭānavāgi¨rdda śrīmatkaḍaṁbēśvara
dēvasthānavū¨rjjitavappaḍācā¨ryyava¨ryyarenipa kalyāṇaśaktidēvariṁdavakkuveṁdu manaṁdaṁdarā yatīṁdrana gurukuḷōnnatiyeṁteṁdaḍe . kaṁ .
kāḷamukhavādiyāge samāḷaṁkṛta sūtradhātupa¨rvvataveṁdiṁtāḷōkisi nālkaṟoḷaṁ kāḷāmukha śrīviḷāpa maṇimukuruṁdaṁ . Ene vāmadēvaya
tipuṇyanidānaṁ negaḷdanā munīśana śiṣyaṁ manucaritaṁ vādimadēbhanakhāyudhanenipa vādirudrayatīṁdra . ka . taṁnutaśiṣyaṁ pesa¨rvaḍedaṁ nikhiḷāvaniyoḷā kriyā
śaktivesa¨rttaṁnoḷeseyaltapassaṁpannaṁ tacciṣyanam®tarāśiyatīśaṁ . v® . Esevaṁ śrīkaṇṭadēvaṁ budhanidhi tadapatyaṁ tadīyōdghaśiṣyaṁ kusumāstratyrakṣanu¨rvvīpra
dhitaguṇanivāsaṁ kriyāśaktidēvaṁ jasavaṁ tacciṣyanāṁtaṁ vinatanṛpalasanmauḷi māṇikyakānti prasarōdyatkēsarāṁghridvayasarasīruhōdbhāsi
sa¨rvvēśvarā¨ryyaṁ . tanmanaṟpraya śiṣyaṁ . v® . vadanaṁ cātu¨ryyavāṇīviharaṇasadanaṁ saṁtataṁ nētravāpū¨rṇnadayāpātraṁ svahastaṁ vitaraṇakaraṇā
bhyastavātmīya vakṣaṁ viditatryakṣaṁ yatitati tanagilleṁbinaṁ nityasatyābhyudayaṁ kalyāṇaśakti bratipati negaḷdaṁ pūtav®ttāvadātaṁ . v® . jana
maṁ mōhipa mū¨rti mū¨rttigeṇeyādudyattapaṁ tattapakkanurūpappa caritravā caritadiṁ mūlōkamaṁ kūḍepāvanamaṁ māḷpa jasaṁ pogaḷteva
ḍeguṁ kalyāṇaśaktibratīṁdranoḷaṁbhōnidhiruṁdranoḷyivapadāṁbōjā¨rccanātaṁdranoḷ . ślōkaṁ . cittaṁ vidvanmukhābjānāṁ smēratāṁ kurutēnvahaṁ . kalyāṇa
śaktidēvasya vadanāmṛtadīdhitiḥ . kaṁ . tadanusamudbhavanīśvarapadakamaḷa bhramaranāgamābjātasamabhyuditadaśaśata mayūkhaṁ madanōgraṁ
mūṟujāvidēvabratipaṁ . kaṁ . tōḷapa sudhāṁśuvanudara sthaḷadoḷtaḷediṁdukāntadantire mṛḍanujjaḷise nijahṛdayadoḷagāgaḷuvesavaṁ mūṟujāvidēva
munīṁdra . kaṁ . tacciṣyanaghakujabrajaviccēdanapaṭukuṭhāranurutaranutavidvaccaraṇaṁ lakuḷīśvaranaccaguṇāṁbōdhi gurukuḷāṁbudhicaṁdraṁ . kaṁ . sale lakuḷī
śvaradēva sulalitasitakī¨rttilatikeyaṁ baḷayisuvaṁ viḷasadvita raṇakāṁcanajaḷadhāreyinakhiḷa lōkamaṁ pa¨rvvuvinaṁ . va . Antā yamaniyamasvādhyā
ya dhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānajapasamādhiśīlasaṁpaṁnaruṁ gurukuḷasamuddharaṇarumappa kalyāṇaśaktipaṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ ka¨rcci śrīkaḍaṁbēśvara dēvaraṁ
gabhōgakhaṇḍaspuṭitajī¨rṇnōddhārakkaveṁdu śakava¨rṣa 1097 neya jaya saṁvatsarada jēṣṭa bahuḷadamāvāsyeyādityavāra vyatīpāta sū
¨ryyagrahaṇadaṁdu śrīmanmahāmaṁṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ pāṇḍyadēvarasaruṁ kumāra haḍavaḷa cauṁḍarasanuṁ dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi nūṟuṁbā
ḍadoḷage sīvaṭa sahitavūrūralu gadyāṇavoṁdu . sūḷegēriyaṁ teṁkalu kēriyoṁdu . dēvara nandādīvigege gāṇaveraḍu . kalidēvara mūḍa deseyalu
hūdōṁṭavoṁdu . maṭhadiṁ mūḍalsāyiramarada tōṁṭada sthaḷa . Eḍegōḍalu hōtumaṇna gadde mattaroṁdu . sthaḷavṛttiya bhūmiya pramāṇu dēva
ra kaḷasavaṁ mēṭṭi nōḍalkumudvatiyiṁ mūḍalu dṛṣṭi ma¨ryyāde baḍagalu mūkūṟatiya hoḷeyiṁ heddāriviḍideḍegōḍa keṟeya ha
ḍuvaṇa kōḍi mēre teṁkalu koḷakanakeṟeya teṁkagōḍi sīme mattaṁ hosageṟeya gaddeyiṁ mūḍalu hagalūṭṭageymattaroṁdu . Intinutumaṁ biṭṭaru . vṛttaṁ .
naliviṁdīdha¨rmmamaṁ pāḷipanṛpa¨rgge gayāvāraṇāśi prayāgasthaḷadoḷ gaṁgādipuṁṇyaprada nikhiḷa nadītīra doḷvēdavidyāviḷasadviprāḷigukta kramadoḷ
kasilākōṭiyaṁ kū¨rttu koṭṭā phaḷavakkuṁ kāyada pilegaḷa koṁda māpāpavakkuṁ . mattaṁ kāḷapriyadēva¨rgge dēviṁgeṟeya keḷage modalēriya
lli gadde kaṁmavippattu . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁndarāṁ ṣaṣṭi va¨rṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . śrīkaḍaṁbēśvarāya namaḥ .
